rationale: Current title is Content Writer at a fictional company (Dunder Mifflin) with a career spanning content writing, operations, and marketing — zero ML, IR, or engineering experience relevant to this role.

Career consists entirely of Marketing Manager, Graphic Designer, and Accountant roles with no engineering, ML, or IR experience, and skills are limited to Content Writing and basic web/data tools with no production ML work.

Project Manager and Business Analyst at fictional companies (Stark Industries, Globex Inc) with non-technical skills (YOLO listed as advanced but career shows no ML/AI engineering work and descriptions are accounting/operations roles).

Entire career is Project Manager and HR Manager roles at fictional companies (Initech, Dunder Mifflin) with no ML or engineering production experience; recent online courses on RAG do not compensate for zero technical depth.

Has 6.3 years of software engineering experience (cloud/DevOps, frontend, QA) with Python background and a small RAG side project, but spent significant time at IT-services firms (TCS, HCL) with no production IR/ranking/embedding systems experience.

Civil Engineer with only 2.7 years of experience at Globex Inc and TCS with no ML or IR work; despite a Ph.D in AI listed in education and Weights & Biases skill, the actual career descriptions are content writing and sales with zero production ML evidence.

Graphic Designer at Wipro and TCS (IT-services firms) for the entirety of a 5.9-year career with skills limited to CSS, Excel, and Angular — no ML, IR, or engineering production experience whatsoever.

Business Analyst and HR Manager roles at TCS, Stark Industries (fictional), and Initech (fictional) with no ML engineering experience; listed data pipeline and Snowflake skills do not offset a fundamentally non-technical profile.

Mechanical Engineer at Globex Inc with only 2.6 years of hardware product design experience; despite Time Series and FastAPI skills listed, there is no ML, IR, or software engineering production work in the career history.

Operations Manager at fictional company Wayne Enterprises with only 1.2 years of experience in customer support team lead work; no ML, IR, or engineering background despite listing infrastructure-adjacent skills (Terraform, Apache Beam).
